free_text: The excitation functions and isomeric ratios for
neutron induced reactions on Mo-92 and Zr-90
Energy resolution obtained taking account of the
geometrical condition of neutron source and the fact
that neutrons are slowed down in the tritium target.
In absolute measurement, the absolute neutron yield
was measured and its time variation was recorded by
For neutron yield of neutron source.
Gamma activity measured by NaI(Tl) well-type
Its efficiency was calibrated by the IAEA
standard sources Na-22, Mn-54, Co-60, Zn-65, Cs-137.

M.M. BIB and COMMON information was added.
Free text was corrected to be "human-readable".
REACTION lines in several Subents were corrected.
